case_title: ELOISE HODGE VS. ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $10.00 SERVED JUL-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HAMED SHALIZI, GENERAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PROGRES REPORT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF ELOISE HODGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HAMED SHALIZ GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGMENT STANDS: PLAINTIFF CHOOSES TO KEEP THE SCOOTER SINCE SHE CANNOT GET A TOTAL REFUND FOR IT ($1000.00 IS NOT A FULL REFUND). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HODGE, ELOISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF UPON THE RETURN OF THE SCOOTER TO DEFENDANT BY OCTOBER 3, 2019. DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE SUM OF $1000.00. THE PARTIES SHALL REPORT BACK TO THE COURT FOR A PROGRESS REPORT ON OCTOBER 15, 2019 AT 1:30P.M. IF PARTIES FAIL TO APPEAR, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HODGE, ELOISE
ORDER RE: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,736.00 FILED BY HODGE, ELOISE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2019 BY ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY, REPRESENTED BY HAMED SHALIZI, IS PRESENT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED IN OPEN COURT AND RETURNED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLURE MOBILITY & MEDICAL SUPPLY
